parties.name: FREEMAN, SANDY K 584 CASTRO STREET #204 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-22-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Petitioner: Sandy K. Freeman, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Sandy Wagner.
The Court further orders the GENDER of Sandy Wagner is changed from MALE to FEMALE
Decree signed in open court.
